CUBE CRUSHER IDLE

Rotate your device to landscape for the best view.

Tap to crush!

Upgrades

THE PRESS NEVER SLEEPS

A mountain of cubes. One hydraulic press. Infinite money.

Crush your way up from nothing. Unlock golden cubes worth 10×. Survive boss cubes that hit back. And when you've crushed enough — Rebirth. Reset everything, keep a permanent power, and go harder.

The machine gets stronger every time you do.

🖥️ Best played on a computer screen — or tilt your phone sideways (landscape) for the full view.

Choose one permanent bonus

REBIRTH
